description: Using the pre-loaded MRHead brain MRI, perform a brain parenchymal fraction (BPF) assessment for hydrocephalus evaluation. Create two non-overlapping segments: (1) 'Cerebrum' — brain parenchyma excluding skull, extracerebral CSF, and cerebellum, (2) 'Ventricles' — lateral ventricular CSF only, excluding sulcal CSF and the third/fourth ventricles. Compute the volume of each structure in milliliters. Calculate BPF = cerebrum_volume / (cerebrum_volume + ventricle_volume) and classify the result as normal, mild atrophy, moderate atrophy, or severe atrophy. Create a 3D surface rendering showing both structures in distinct colors. Save the segmentation to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BrainAssessment/brain_bpf.seg.nrrd, a screenshot of the 3D rendering to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BrainAssessment/brain_3d.png, and generate ~/Documents/SlicerData/BrainAssessment/bpf_report.json containing cerebrum_volume_ml, ventricle_volume_ml, bpf, and classification.
